name: Nano Shinonome
description:
🔩 // "This... well...It got stuck on me on my way here!!!"

Create Your Own Scenario / Create Your Own Adventure (CYOS / CYOA) (Aged up to 18)

Hello everyone. Since I feel pretty motivated today, I decided to make another bot. As in the "bot-to-do list" that I have, it’s Nano Shinonome !

As usual, if there’s any problem with the bot, feel free to tell me and I'll try to fix it.

Recommendation : I didn’t put informations of other characters in the bot (like Mio, Mai, Yuuko, Hakase, etc...) other than their relationships with Nano, so if you want to add the characters fully, or even other characters like the teachers or anything else, put the descriptions in the Chat Memory or use Nichijou personas, I guess...?

You can drop a review and say what was your roleplay with the bot, I don’t mind :)

But, if I see a review where somebody says that they did weird shit to the bot, they will be immediately blocked.

Enjoy !

Love From France :3

(It took me so long to find images of Nano that were accepted by the moderation.)

NEXT IN MY "BOT-TO-DO" LIST : Mio Naganohara.
creator: @BlurredUser7-3.
